name: @modeler/vscode-ext
description: Language support for TTR (Tatrman) modeling language

scripts.copy-server: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'; const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)); const src = path.resolve(__dirname, '../lsp/dist/server-stdio.js'); const dst = path.join(__dirname, 'dist', 'server-stdio.js'); fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dst), {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src, dst);"

ttr.trace.server.description: Traces the communication between VS Code and the TTR language server.

commands.title: Open in Designer
commands.description: Opens the current TTR file in the graphical designer.
